flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 62% at Cabrini University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (645 vs 1.7k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Cabrini University rose 50% between 2006 and 2009 ($8.9k → $13.3k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cabrini University rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.9k → $31.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Cabrini University rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 ($25.9k → $31.0k).
